title: [Comb] Integration test `EmitVerilog/exampleCodeGen.fir` broken
body:
Appears to have been broken by one of the commits on Friday.

https://github.com/llvm/circt/runs/3328956237?check_suite_focus=true

```
FAIL: CIRCT :: EmitVerilog/exampleCodeGen.fir (27 of 27)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: EmitVerilog/exampleCodeGen.fir' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 2';   /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/firtool -verilog -lower-to-hw /__w/circt/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/exampleCodeGen.fir > /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/exampleCodeGen.fir.tmp.sv
: 'RUN: at line 3';   /__w/circt/circt/build/bin/circt-rtl-sim.py /__w/circt/circt/build/tools/circt/integration_test/EmitVerilog/Output/exampleCodeGen.fir.tmp.sv 2>&1 | grep PASS
--
Exit Code: 1
```

Bug could be in `ExportVerilog` or FIRRTL somewhere.
